name: Blackpowder's Buccaneers
inspire: After you remove your third or subsequent swag token, Inspire each friendly fighter.

abilities.name: Loot and Plunder
abilities.flavorText: Ownership means little to these pilfering pirates.
abilities.rulesText:
You start the game with 1 swag token.

If a friendly fighter's weapon has the {icon:skull} runemark, you have access to the following Weapon ability:

Swashbuckle {icon:skull}:
If the Attack was successful, gain 1 swag token. If you are the underdog ({icon:destined}) or the target was equipped with any Upgrades, gain 2 swag tokens instead.

abilities.name: Swag Shrapnel
abilities.flavorText: Stolen gold, silver spoons, rusty nails: it all comes out of Gorlok's grunderbuss in a blast of flesh-shearing shrapnel.
abilities.rulesText:
You can use 1 of the following abilities immediately after you pick a ranged weapon as part of your leader's ({icon:leader}) Attack. When you pick the ability, you can remove up to 2 of your swag tokens. You can only use each ability once per game.

After that Attack, you can pick up to 2 other enemy fighters within 2 hexes of the target. Then, roll a number of Attack dice equal to the number of swag tokens you removed. If the roll contained any {icon:fury} or {icon:crit}, inflict 1 damage on each of those fighters and give the target and each of those fighters a Stagger token.

abilities.name: Swag Blast
abilities.flavorText: By crushing a handful of swag in his fist, Blackpowder creates a crumpled but effective cannonball for his grunderbuss.
abilities.rulesText: That weapon has +1 Damage and Cleave ({icon:cleave}) for that Attack. If the target is driven back, give the target a Stagger token. After this attack, you can push up to X other friendly fighters 1 hex and can give them each a Charge token, where X is the number of swag tokens you removed.

abilities.name: Swag Mortar
abilities.flavorText: By aiming his grunderbuss high, nowhere is safe from Gorlok's rain of red-hot loot.
abilities.rulesText: That weapon has +1 Damage and +X Range for that Attack, where X is the number of swag tokens you removed. After this attack, you can push up to X other friendly fighters 1 hex and can give them each a Charge token, where X is the number of swag tokens you removed.
